title: Elbaf’s Past Turns Violent
description: On pages 10–12, this part follows Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Rocks D. Xebec as Elbaf’s history turns darker as older conflicts, powerful bloodlines, and the roots of hatred behind the present crisis come into focus.
scene: Elbaf’s history turns darker as older conflicts, powerful bloodlines, and the roots of hatred behind the present crisis come into focus.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm sorry!! It's our fault!! You faced that thing to save us... even though you weren't ready yet!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We have no choice but to jump into the sea and swim!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I WON'T LET THE DAY CLAN END HERE!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: extinguish all who remain on the island...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Vice Admiral GARP, Please hurry up!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I told ya to get the hell outta here!! How long are ya gonna stick around?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Why does he look like that?!

summary: This part advances Elbaf’s Violent Past through 27 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
